title: rubus mandersii
intro: Rubus mandersii, also known as the Taiwan raspberry or mountain raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus mandersii include reducing inflammation and pain, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and its leaves and berries can also be used in tinctures and salves.
